headline: Interest Rate Cut Hopes Are Over: Buy These Safe 5% High Yield Kings Now
summary: Despite the Federal Reserve’s median forecast of one rate cut in 2026, a growing number of economists and analysts believe no cuts may materialize this year. The Federal Reserve has now held rates steady at 3.5% to 3.75% for two consecutive meetings, as inflation continues to run above the central bank’s 2% target and the ... Interest Rate Cut Hopes Are Over: Buy These Safe 5% High Yield Kings Now

headline: VICI Properties Inc. Increases Involvement in One Beverly Hills Financing & Extends Strategic Relationship With Cain and Eldridge Industries
summary: NEW YORK, March 23, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI", "VICI Properties" or the "Company") today announced that it has expanded its long-term strategic relationship with Cain and Eldridge Industries by providing a $1.5 billion mezzanine loan (the "VICI Mezzanine Loan") behind a $2.8 billion senior loan commitment led by J.P. Morgan as part of the construction financing for One Beverly Hills. The VICI Mezzanine Loan represents a $1.05 billion incremental commitment beyond VICI’s exi

headline: Is VICI Properties (VICI) One of the Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy According to Analysts?
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is one of the Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.
